titleZh: 帝斯曼-芬美意全资收购Verax，强化动物健康AI预测平台
summaryZh: 帝斯曼-芬美意动物营养与健康部门宣布从InsideTracker手中全资收购Verax™预测性农场分析平台。该平台基于血液生物标志物，是全球唯一部署的早期预警系统，可预测和评估动物健康状况。此次收购将增强公司在人工智能、数据分析和精准营养方面的能力，帮助养殖户提前发现健康与饲养挑战，降低成本并提升可持续性。
translationZh:
全球可持续动物营养解决方案领导者帝斯曼-芬美意动物营养与健康部门（ANH）宣布，已从InsideTracker手中收购Verax™预测性农场分析平台的全部所有权。

过去七年间，Verax已发展成为行业内唯一全球部署的早期预警平台，使一体化养殖企业和养殖户能够通过血液生物标志物预测和评估动物健康状况。

这一里程碑标志着ANH在人工智能、数据分析和精准营养能力方面迈出了重要一步，这些能力使全球动物生产者能够改善动物性能、降低成本并提升可持续性成果。

**战略收购与未来整合**

此次收购使ANH能够将Verax无缝集成到其精准服务生态系统中，确保从数据采集、模型开发到农场层面咨询支持的全系统互操作性。三名InsideTracker员工也已加入ANH，以确保平稳过渡和持续创新。

ANH动物营养与健康部门总裁Ivo Lansbergen表示：“通过完全拥有Verax软件，我们强化了数据驱动和软件能力，帮助养殖户提前识别健康与饲养挑战，同时赋予我们自由来增强这一独特平台，并加速动物养殖领域的AI驱动创新。”

**合作起源与发展**

Verax的旅程始于2019年，当时ANH与InsideTracker共同着手将人类生物标志物技术和机器学习转化为动物养殖领域的可操作洞察。

精准营养与健康部门负责人Scott Cavey解释说：“2019年，我们与InsideTracker共同启动了一个项目，为动物生产开发基于血液的预测与评估系统。他们的技术专长和科学严谨性帮助Verax成长为一个稳健、可信的平台，将生物标志物数据和同行评审证据转化为实用、可操作的洞察。”

InsideTracker领导层也表达了同样的看法。InsideTracker首席执行官Rony Sellam指出：“Verax合作源于一个共同的愿景：利用数据作为预测机制来改善动物健康与福利。帝斯曼-芬美意在动物科学方面的专长使其成为Verax所提供的开创性洞察的理想归宿，同时也为InsideTracker提供了更专注于扩展其人类健康技术平台Terra能力的机会。我们对这一结果感到满意，并期待看到我们共同工作的遗产延续下去，以及预测分析和人工智能继续为动物养殖带来显著益处。”
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了AI预测平台在动物健康管理中的实际落地，通过血液生物标志物实现早期预警，是智慧畜牧领域精准养殖与数据驱动决策的典型案例，值得关注其技术路径与商业化模式。
contentFull: Livestock ManagementHog HealthNewsdsm-firmenich brings Verax in houseAfter 7-year partnership with InsideTracker, ANH acquires full ownership of animal health AI prediction platform.Industry ReleaseJune 29, 2026schedule2 Min ReadGetty ImagesGlobal sustainable animal nutrition solutions leader dsm-firmenich Animal Nutrition & Health (ANH) announced it has acquired full ownership of the Verax™ predictive farm analytics platform from InsideTracker.Over the past seven years, Verax has grown into the industry’s only globally deployed early-warning platform that enables integrators and growers to predict and assess animal health status through blood-based biomarkers.This milestone marks a significant step in advancing ANH’s artificial intelligence, data analytics and precision nutrition capabilities that enable animal producers worldwide to improve animal performance, reduce costs and enhance sustainability outcomes.Strategic acquisition and future integrationThe acquisition allows ANH to integrate Verax seamlessly into its Precision Services ecosystem, ensuring full system interoperability — from data capture and model development to farm-level advisory support. Three InsideTracker colleagues have also joined ANH to enable a smooth transition and continued innovation.Related:Texas seeks FDA approval for feed-based ivermectin"With Verax software fully owned by ANH, we strengthen our data-driven and software competencies, helping farmers identify health and husbandry challenges well in advance, while giving us the freedom to enhance this unique platform and accelerate AI-driven innovation in animal farming," said Ivo Lansbergen, president, Animal Nutrition & Health.Partnership origins and developmentThe Verax journey began in 2019, when ANH and InsideTracker jointly set out to translate human biomarker technology and machine learning into actionable insights for animal farming."In 2019, we embarked on a joint endeavor with InsideTracker to develop a blood-based prediction and assessment system for animal production," explained Scott Cavey, head of Precision Nutrition & Health. "Their technological know how and scientific rigor helped shape Verax into a robust, credible platform that transforms biomarker data and peer-reviewed evidence into practical, actionable insights.”InsideTracker leadership echoed this sentiment."The Verax partnership originated with a shared vision: to use data as a prediction mechanism to improve animal health and welfare," noted Rony Sellam, chief executive officer of InsideTracker. “dsm-firmenich's expertise in animal science makes it the perfect home for the pioneering insight that Verax provides and an opportunity for InsideTracker to more fully focus on expanding the capabilities of our human health technology platform, Terra."We are pleased with the outcome and look forward to seeing the legacy of work together live on and predictive analytics and artificial intelligence continue to significantly benefit the animal farming industry," continued Sellam.Related:Strengthen FAD preparedness: 3 essential steps for pork producersNo changes will occur for existing Verax customers; platform support and service continuity are fully assured during the transition.ANH, a dsm-firmenich company, is a global leader in animal nutrition and health, as well as vitamins, carotenoids and aroma ingredients. In 2024, dsm-firmenich shared its plan to find a new owner for the ANH business, including vitamins.InsideTracker is a leading personal health analytics company using blood biomarkers, AI-driven insights and evidence-based recommendations to optimize human health and performance. The company’s science-backed platform has been adopted globally across consumer and enterprise wellness programs.About the AuthorIndustry ReleaseSee more from Industry Releasechevron_rightSubscribe to contentHtml: After 7-year partnership with InsideTracker, ANH acquires full ownership of animal health AI prediction platform.
